headline: CoStar Group Stockholders Overwhelmingly Reelect Director Nominees and Support Say-on-Pay at Annual Meeting of Stockholders
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., June 25, 2026--CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSGP), a leading provider of online real estate marketplaces, information and analytics, today announced the results of its Annual Meeting of Stockholders (the "Annual Meeting") held on June 23, 2026. Stockholders approved all proposals presented at the meeting, including overwhelming support for all director nominees and approval of the Company’s advisory say-on-pay proposal.
